subcodes.first_line: O Joseph! There hath befallen the Wronged One that which the eye of creation hath never beheld the like thereof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یوسف بر مظلوم وارد شد انچه که چشم ابداع عالم شبهش را ندیده
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf]
